title: Nokes Sword and PVP textures
description: This texture pack has many improvments to the main textures of the game including low fire, low shield, small items, and many more which will hopefully improve your pvp skills :)
body: This texture pack includes a wide range of improvements to Minecraft’s default textures, all designed with PvP in mind. Features like low fire, a low shield, and smaller, cleaner item textures help reduce visual clutter and keep more of the screen visible during fights. Many other tweaks and optimizations are included to make combat feel smoother, clearer, and more responsive. Whether you’re playing on PvP servers or practicing duels, this pack is made to help you stay focused, react faster, and hopefully improve your PvP skills
